ham.subject: Reminder: Semester Project Submission Deadline – 3 Days Remaining
ham.body:
Dear Alex,

This is a friendly reminder that the semester project submission deadline is fast approaching. Please submit your final project to the university portal by Friday, 5th November 2024, 11:59 PM. The submission should be in PDF format, with the project report and source code zipped in a single archive named 'Project_<StudentID>.zip'.

If you have any questions or need an extension, please contact the course coordinator, Prof. Dr. Emily Carter, at emily.carter@university.edu before the deadline.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
Academic Support Team

spam.subject: Urgent: QuickBooks Invoice #987654 – Immediate Payment Required
spam.body:
Hello [Name],

We have detected an outstanding invoice for the QuickBooks/Norton software package with the following details:

Invoice Number: 987654
Amount Due: $1,250.00
Due Date: 08/09/2024

If the payment is not completed by the due date, your account will be suspended and you may lose access to your financial data. To pay now, log into the secure portal at <URL> and submit the payment.

Please note that this invoice has been flagged as a potential phishing attempt. Verify the invoice details with your accountant before proceeding.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
QuickBooks Support Team
